name: Nighteye
notes: Renamed from WorldView to Nighteye. 35 Swift files. 3D MapKit globe with 30+ data layers across 15 free APIs. NEW: Capital Flow Intelligence system — politician stock trades (House/Senate Stock Watcher), USASpending.gov contracts, LDA lobbying, Treasury fiscal data, BLS JOLTS. Signal analysis engine with cascade phases. 6-tab app: Globe, Live Feeds, Smart Money, Intel, Alerts, Settings. 5-page onboarding. Dark theme (NETheme) with teal accent.
